arabic: الصَّدَقَةُ عِبَادَةٌ يُحِبُّهَا اللَّهُ وَتُطْفِئُ غَضَبَهُ. قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «الصَّدَقَةُ تُطْفِئُ الْخَطِيئَةَ كَمَا يُطْفِئُ الْمَاءُ النَّارَ» [رَوَاهُ التِّرْمِذِيُّ، وَصَحَّحَهُ الْأَلْبَانِيُّ]. وَالصَّدَقَةُ لَيْسَتْ بِالْمَالِ فَقَطْ، بَلْ كُلُّ مَعْرُوفٍ صَدَقَةٌ كَمَا قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الصُّلْحِ]. وَالصَّدَقَةُ لَا تُنْقِصُ الْمَالَ بَلْ تَزِيدُهُ بِبَرَكَةِ اللَّهِ. وَالدَّرْسُ أَنَّ الْمُسْلِمَ يَتَصَدَّقُ بِمَا يَسْتَطِيعُ وَلَوْ بِكَلِمَةٍ طَيِّبَةٍ.
translation: Sadaka je ibadet koji Allah voli i kojim se gasi Njegov gnjev. Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: «Sadaka gasi grijeh onako kao što voda gasi vatru» [Bilježi Tirmizi, a vjerodostojnim ga ocijenio Albani]. Sadaka nije samo novac, nego je svako dobro djelo sadaka, kako je rekao Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem [Bilježi Buharija u Knjizi o pomirenju]. Sadaka ne umanjuje imetak nego ga povećava Allahovim bereketom. Pouka je da musliman daje sadaku koliko može, pa makar i lijepom riječju.
translationEn: Sadaqah (voluntary charity) is an act of worship that Allah loves and which extinguishes His anger. The Prophet, peace be upon him, said: 'Charity extinguishes sin just as water extinguishes fire' [Narrated by al-Tirmidhi, authenticated by al-Albani]. Sadaqah is not only money — every act of kindness is sadaqah, as the Prophet said [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Peacemaking]. Sadaqah does not decrease wealth but increases it through Allah's blessing. The lesson is that a Muslim gives charity according to their ability, even if only with a kind word.
